Part.Source: Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WPESTOQUEFORNECEDOR', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) RetornaTelaProduto.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &NomeTelaProduto) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO PadraoUsuario.Call('L', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() &PesCod = Val(subStr(&PadObs,1,8)) &SetCod = Val(subStr(&PadObs,9,8)) Do Case Case subStr(&PadObs,17,1) = 'A' &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO Case subStr(&PadObs,17,1) = 'I' &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO otherwise &ProSts.SetEmpty() EndCase &Aux = subStr(&PadObs,18,1) &ProTipDef.FromString(&Aux) &GrupHie = trim(subStr(&PadObs,19,20)) &ComEstoque = subStr(&PadObs,39,1) &TipoFornecedor = subStr(&PadObs,40,1) &Ordenar = subStr(&PadObs,41,1) EndIf do 'Fornecedor' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod.Visible = False GridEstoqueFornecedors_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridEstoqueFornecedors.InternalName GridEstoqueFornecedors.Rows = Page.Rows GridEstoqueFornecedorsPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridEstoqueFornecedors.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh loadwwpContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridEstoqueFornecedorsCurrentPage = GridEstoqueFornecedors.CurrentPage &GridEstoqueFornecedorsPageCount = GridEstoqueFornecedors.PageCount EstoqueFornecedor__ProGraRef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod EndEvent Event GridEstoqueFornecedors.Load EstoqueFornecedor__EstSdo.ColumnClass = iif(&EstoqueFornecedor.CurrentItem.EstSdo > 0 , !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnGreen WWColumnGreenSingleCell', !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnRed WWColumnRedSingleCell') EstoqueFornecedor__EstQtd.LinkTarget = '_blank' EstoqueFornecedor__EstQtd.Link = wpConsultaEstoque.link(&EstoqueFornecedor.CurrentItem.ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &Fornecedores = !'' EstoqueFornecedor__ProGraRef.ColumnClass = iif(&EstoqueFornecedor.CurrentItem.ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.Inativo, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EstoqueFornecedor__ProGraRef.linkTarget = '_blank' if &NomeTelaProduto = 'WWPRODUTO' EstoqueFornecedor__ProGraRef.link = Produtos.Link('', TrnMode.Update, &Context.EmpCod, &EstoqueFornecedor.CurrentItem.ProCod, '') Else EstoqueFornecedor__ProGraRef.link = ImpProduto.Link(TrnMode.Update, &Context.EmpCod, &EstoqueFornecedor.CurrentItem.ProCod) EndIF &Fornecedores.Link = WPFornecedorProduto.Link(&EstoqueFornecedor.CurrentItem.ProCod, 'WPESTOQUEFORNECEDOR') &Fornecedores.LinkTarget = '_blank' EndEvent Event GridEstoqueFornecedorsPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridEstoqueFornecedorsPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' GridEstoqueFornecedors.PreviousPage() Case GridEstoqueFornecedorsPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &PageToGo = GridEstoqueFornecedors.CurrentPage &PageToGo += 1 GridEstoqueFornecedors.GotoPage(&PageToGo) Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridEstoqueFornecedorsPaginationBar.SelectedPage) GridEstoqueFornecedors.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridEstoqueFornecedorsPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridEstoqueFornecedors.Rows = GridEstoqueFornecedorsPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue GridEstoqueFornecedors.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoImprimir' If &EstoqueFornecedor.Count > 0 &websession.set('sdtFornecedorEst',&EstoqueFornecedor.ToXml()) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS102.link(&EmpCod,&Context.FilCod,&PesCod,&PesRaz,&TipoFornecedor) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) Else Msg('Nenhum resultado para imprimir!') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoCalcMinimo' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpEstoqueMinimo.PopUp() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ wpEstoqueFornecedor.Link() EndEvent Event &PesCod.IsValid If &OldPesCod <> &PesCod Do 'Fornecedor' EndIf EndEvent Event &SetCod.Click If &OldSetCod <> &SetCod do 'BuscarInformacao' EndIf EndEvent Event &ProSts.Click If &OldProSts <> &ProSts do 'BuscarInformacao' EndIf EndEvent Event &ComEstoque.Click If &OldComEstoque <> &ComEstoque do 'BuscarInformacao' EndIf EndEvent Event &ProTipDef.Click If &OldProTipDef <> &ProTipDef do 'BuscarInformacao' EndIf EndEvent Event &Ordenar.Click If &OldOrdenar <> &Ordenar do 'BuscarInformacao' EndIf EndEvent Event &TipoFornecedor.Click If &OldTipoFornecedor <> &TipoFornecedor do 'BuscarInformacao' EndIf EndEvent Event &GrupHie.Click If &OldGrupHie <> &GrupHie do 'BuscarInformacao' EndIf EndEvent Sub 'BuscarInformacao' &PadObs = &PesCod.ToFormattedString() &PadObs += &SetCod.ToFormattedString() &PadObs += PadL(&ProSts, 1, ' ') &PadObs += PadL(&ProTipDef.ToFormattedString(), 1, ' ') &PadObs += padR(&GrupHie, 20, ' ') &PadObs += PadL(&ComEstoque, 1, ' ') &PadObs += PadL(&TipoFornecedor , 1, ' ') &PadObs += PadL(&Ordenar, 1, ' ') PadraoUsuario.Call('G', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If &PesCod <> 0 &EstoqueFornecedor.Clear() &auxGrupHie = &GrupHie.Trim() + '.' Do case case &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO &AuxProSts = Status_Produto.ATIVO case &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO &AuxProSts = Status_Produto.INATIVO otherwise &AuxProSts = nullvalue(&AuxProSts) EndCase If &TipoFornecedor = 'B' CarregaEstoqueFornecedor.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PesCod,&SetCod,&ProTipDef, &GrupHie,&auxGrupHie,&AuxProSts,&ComEstoque, &Ordenar, &EstoqueFornecedor) Else CarregaEstoqueFornecedorProduto.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PesCod,&SetCod,&ProTipDef,&GrupHie,&auxGrupHie,&AuxProSts,&ComEstoque, &Ordenar, &EstoqueFornecedor) EndIf // refresh EndIf &OldSetCod = &SetCod &OldProSts = &ProSts &OldComEstoque = &ComEstoque &OldProTipDef = &ProTipDef &OldTipoFornecedor = &TipoFornecedor &OldGrupHie = &GrupHie &OldPesCod = &PesCod &OldOrdenar = &Ordenar EndSub Sub 'Fornecedor' &IsAchou = False If &PesCod = 0 &PesRaz = 'Informe o Fornecedor' &EstoqueFornecedor.Clear() Else For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PesCod &PesRaz = PesRaz &IsAchou = True Exit When none &PesRaz = 'Fornecedor não encontrado!' Msg('Fornecedor não encontrado!') &PesCod.SetFocus() &EstoqueFornecedor.Clear() EndFor EndIf If &IsAchou = True// and &IsRetorno = False do 'BuscarInformacao' EndiF EndSub
